shortDescription.text: Detects arbitrary code execution vulnerabilities or malicious payloads.

fullDescription.text: Identifies patterns indicative of remote code execution, malware distribution, or other forms of malicious code designed to compromise system integrity or confidentiality.

shortDescription.text: Detects exposed sensitive information like API keys or credentials.

fullDescription.text: Scans for hardcoded API keys, passwords, tokens, or other sensitive credentials that could lead to unauthorized access or data breaches.

shortDescription.text: Detects prompt injection or jailbreaking attempts.

fullDescription.text: Identifies input patterns or content designed to bypass security filters, manipulate AI agent behavior, or extract confidential information through prompt injection or jailbreaking techniques.
Looks for code constructs or patterns that suggest an attempt to covertly transfer data out of the system or environment.

shortDescription.text: Detects insecure third-party content or dependencies.

fullDescription.text: Identifies the use of vulnerable or untrusted third-party libraries, modules, or external content that could introduce security risks.
